title: Eliminate defer/recover from send() hot path — PLAN CAREFULLY
description: MEDIUM RISK — requires careful planning. This is the single biggest performance win available. Replace panic/recover NLR with explicit unwinding/unwindTarget/unwindValue fields on Interpreter. Check unwinding flag after each runFrame() return, pop frames until target reached. Remove all 3 defer/recover blocks from Execute(), send(), sendSuper(). Touches the most critical code path in the VM — must not break any existing NLR behavior. Plan should include: detailed frame lifecycle analysis, benchmark baseline, rollback strategy. See docs/research/vm-internals-research.md TODO 5.

title: Assign MetaclassClass on VM — metaclass infrastructure mostly exists
description: ClassVTable with parent-chain inheritance already works (vm/class.go:369-387). The MetaclassClass field exists on VM struct (vm/vm.go:27) but is never assigned. Create metaclass objects lazily by reusing existing ClassVTable as the metaclass VTable. See docs/research/language-features-research.md TODO 14.

title: Break up ObjectRegistry into generic TypedRegistry[K,V] — PLAN CAREFULLY
description: MEDIUM RISK — requires careful planning. ObjectRegistry is 1071 lines with 25+ registries and ~50 sync primitives. Zero cross-registry deps found. Define generic TypedRegistry[K comparable, V any] with Get/Put/Delete/GC/ForEach. Migrate incrementally from least-used (CUE, JSON) to most-used (strings, dictionaries). Plan should include: complete caller audit per registry, GC coordination analysis, migration order with rollback points. See docs/research/architecture-research.md TODO 9.

title: Reduce string registry contention — single RLock in primitiveEQ
description: LOW RISK (immediate fix). Hold one RLock across both string lookups in primitiveEQ instead of acquiring twice. Currently does two mutex-guarded map lookups per string comparison. See docs/research/vm-internals-research.md TODO 8 for analysis. Longer-term: 16-shard registry (separate issue).

title: Add sorted/hashed collections to core library (Set, Bag, SortedCollection, OrderedDictionary)
description: LOW-MEDIUM RISK. Phase 1: Add Go-side sort: primitive to Array. Phase 2: Set in pure Maggie backed by Dictionary. Phase 3: Bag backed by Dictionary with counts. Phase 4: OrderedDictionary (may need Go backing). Phase 5: SortedCollection using sort primitive. Check existing collection protocols (do:, select:, collect:, inject:into:) and ensure new collections conform. See docs/research/language-features-research.md TODO 17.

title: Remove become: from improvement plan (already implemented)
description: Research found that become: is already fully implemented at vm/object.go:324-357 with both two-way Become() and one-way BecomeForward(). Primitives registered at vm/object_primitives.go:275-307. Update docs/plans/2026-03-03-improvement-plan.md TODO 16 to reflect this.

title: Add sync.RWMutex to VM.Globals map
description: LOW RISK. Wrap vm.Globals with sync.RWMutex on VM struct. Main interpreter takes write lock, forked interpreters take read lock. See docs/research/vm-internals-research.md TODO 4 for analysis. Straightforward mechanical change.

title: Add peephole optimizer pass — PLAN CAREFULLY
description: MEDIUM RISK — requires careful planning. Constant folding is UNSOUND in Smalltalk (can't guarantee receiver type). Focus on: PUSH_SELF+RETURN_TOP -> RETURN_SELF, dead PUSH+POP elimination, unreachable code after OpJump. Main complexity is jump offset fixup when bytes are removed. Plan should include: full opcode catalog analysis, list of safe peephole patterns, jump fixup algorithm design, benchmark targets. See docs/research/architecture-research.md TODO 12.

title: Fix broken exception pass implementation (double-pops handler)
description: Research found that the current pass implementation in exception handling is broken — it double-pops the handler stack. The retry is also a stub. Fix pass to correctly pop current handler and re-signal. See docs/research/language-features-research.md TODO 15 for detailed analysis of the handler stack linked list and recommended fix using new panic types.

title: Eliminate popN() slice allocation with pre-allocated arg buffer
description: LOW RISK. Add [16]Value pre-allocated argument buffer to Interpreter struct (popNFast). 3 of 5 callers (send, sendSuper, OpTailSend) consume args immediately and are safe for zero-alloc sub-slice. Keep allocating popN for OpCreateBlock and OpCreateArray. Run BenchmarkHotPath before/after. See docs/research/vm-internals-research.md TODO 6.

title: Use TryFromSmallInt for BigInt overflow detection
description: TryFromSmallInt() already exists at vm/value.go:203. Marker 10 is free in vm/markers.go for BigInt values. Wrap math/big.Int in BigIntObject and add to ObjectRegistry. See docs/research/language-features-research.md TODO 13 for full design.

title: Flatten VTables for O(1) dispatch — PLAN CAREFULLY
description: LOW-MEDIUM RISK — requires careful planning. Lazy rebuild with dirty bit: add flat []Method field to VTable, rebuild on first lookup after AddMethod dirties it. ~720KB for ~180 classes (negligible). Must audit all places that modify VTables after class creation: AddMethod, AddPrimitiveMethod, AddClassMethod, trait inclusion. Plan should include: enumeration of all VTable mutation sites, memory impact analysis, benchmark comparison for polymorphic dispatch. See docs/research/vm-internals-research.md TODO 7.

title: Wire emitSourcePos() calls into compiler codegen
description: Source map infrastructure already exists end-to-end (SourceLoc struct, SourceMap field on CompiledMethod/BlockMethod, image serialization at 12 bytes/entry). What's missing is emission: the Compiler never calls emitSourcePos during codegen. Add emitSourcePos(node) at top of compileExpr and compileStmt, then enrich StackTrace() with method.SourceLocation(frame.IP). See docs/research/architecture-research.md TODO 11.

title: Extract compilation pipeline from cmd/mag/main.go — PLAN CAREFULLY
description: MEDIUM RISK — requires careful planning. main.go is 1523 lines. 13 of 24 functions are pure compilation logic with no CLI deps. Extract pipeline/ package (CompileAll, CompilePath, LoadProject, CollectFiles) and repl/ package. main.go becomes ~200-line thin dispatcher. Plan should include: complete dependency graph of main.go functions, identification of CLI-coupled state that needs parameterizing, package API signatures, test strategy for extracted packages. See docs/research/architecture-research.md TODO 10.
